title: Real-Time Development Session Tracking

steps.description: Define `DevSession` aggregate with fields for phase, cost, and machine identification in the domain layer.
steps.done_condition: DevSession aggregate is implemented with all required fields.

steps.description: Define `DevSessionRepository` port interface for persistence and `DevSessionNotifier` port interface for broadcasts.
steps.done_condition: Both port interfaces are defined and ready for implementation.

steps.description: Implement SpacetimeDB repository adapter to handle the persistence of `DevSession` data.
steps.done_condition: SpacetimeDB adapter can successfully persist `DevSession` instances.

steps.description: Implement WebSocket notifier adapter to broadcast `DevSession` updates.
steps.done_condition: WebSocket notifier can successfully broadcast `DevSession` updates.

steps.description: Extend existing push HTTP adapter to handle `dev_session` type that posts session updates to `/api/push`.
steps.done_condition: Push HTTP adapter can handle `dev_session` type and post updates correctly.

steps.description: Add `UpdateDevSessionUseCase` for handling incoming `dev_session` updates and triggering persistence and notifications.
Add `ListDevSessionsUseCase` to retrieve live session states from Nexus.
steps.done_condition: `ListDevSessionsUseCase` is implemented and returns live session states correctly.

steps.description: Wire all adapters and use cases in the composition root to ensure proper functionality.
steps.done_condition: All components are correctly wired and can communicate as expected.

steps.description: Implement integration tests to validate the end-to-end functionality of the real-time dev session tracking feature.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass successfully, confirming the feature works as intended.

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports first to establish core data structures.
Merge secondary adapters after domain and ports.
Merge primary adapter after secondary adapters.
Merge use cases after adapters are in place.
Merge composition root last to connect everything.
Run integration tests to validate end-to-end functionality.
successCriteria: Real-time updates of development sessions are visible across team machines.
Session phase transitions and cost updates function correctly through the push API.
Integration tests confirm the overall functionality of the new feature.
